title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account and application settings

html.subtitle: Edit the HEAD section of the Leaflet CRM app. Changes will be applied after page reload.

integrations.title: Integrations

integrations.unlockPremiumDesc: Upgrade to our Premium plan to connect with enterprise-grade tools and unlock advanced automation features that will transform your sales process.

notifications.title: Notifications
